import { TokenType } from "../tokenizer/types"; export declare function parseSpread(): void; export declare function parseRest(isBlockScope: boolean): void; export declare function parseBindingIdentifier(isBlockScope: boolean): void; export declare function parseImportedIdentifier(): void; export declare function markPriorBindingIdentifier(isBlockScope: boolean): void; export declare function parseBindingAtom(isBlockScope: boolean): void; export declare function parseBindingList(close: TokenType, isBlockScope: boolean, allowEmpty?: boolean, allowModifiers?: boolean, contextId?: number): void; export declare function parseMaybeDefault(isBlockScope: boolean, leftAlreadyParsed?: boolean): void;
